prompt: Conceptual editorial illustration for a blog post about personal AI avatar vs work AI avatar. Two distinct rooms or islands facing each other in the same image. Left room represents personal life: warm textures, plants, journal, soft light, human meaning. Right room represents work life: cool tones, desk, planning board, abstract software diagrams, structured energy. Each room contains a subtle AI presence or avatar. A single narrow bridge connects them, suggesting intentional consultation only. Strong metaphor of separation with selective communication. Elegant, modern, premium blog illustration, cinematic composition, minimal but emotionally resonant, no text, no UI mockups, not cartoonish.
